service.description: Extract Shopify orders for an automation window and write normalized JSON output to the automation data-manager folder.

parameter.name: automationId
parameter.description: Automation id passed through for metadata.

parameter.name: automationExecutionId
parameter.description: Automation execution id used to choose the default data-manager output folder.

parameter.name: companyUserGroupId
parameter.description: Trusted automation owner tenant. When present, config access is checked against this tenant instead of a user-session active tenant.

parameter.name: systemEnumId
parameter.description: Source system identifier passed through for metadata.

parameter.name: sourceTypeEnumId
parameter.description: Source type identifier passed through for metadata.

parameter.name: windowStart
parameter.description: Start of the automation window; accepts Timestamp, Date, ISO-8601 text, SQL timestamp text, or epoch milliseconds.

parameter.name: windowEnd
parameter.description: End of the automation window; accepts Timestamp, Date, ISO-8601 text, SQL timestamp text, or epoch milliseconds.

parameter.name: windowStartDate
parameter.description: Raw parent window start passed by the automation executor.

parameter.name: windowEndDate
parameter.description: Raw parent window end passed by the automation executor.

parameter.name: fileName
parameter.description: Optional output file name. Defaults to shopify-orders-{fromMillis}-{thruMillis}.json.
